title: verbascum × coenobitanum
intro: Verbascum × coenobitanum, also known as the hybrid mullein, is a plant species created by crossing the common mullein (Verbascum thapsus) with Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × coenobitanum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce symptoms of allergies and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
